category_sources: source_facts.description says dnsrobocert manages Let's Encrypt SSL certificates based on DNS challenges; official docs describe DNSroboCert as managing certificates with DNS challenges.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses the display name DNSroboCert.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to official DNSroboCert documentation; official GitHub Pages documentation is also maintained for the project.
repo_sources: Official DNSroboCert documentation and package metadata identify adferrand/dnsrobocert as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official documentation describe Let's Encrypt certificate automation using DNS challenges.
